_comment: Daily video pool for the autoposter. `pick_daily_video.py` rotates through `pool` in order, never repeating a clip until the whole pool has cycled. Edit captions/hashtags freely; add new entries when you render more videos into ~/videos/_vault and copy them here.

pool.caption: I had an old iPhone sitting in my drawer for a YEAR. PurchasingCorp quoted me in 60 seconds and paid me $855 the same day — Zelle, Cash App, whatever you want. If you've got old tech lying around, get a quote at purchasingcorp.com
That old phone in your drawer is worth real money. 60-second quote, cash the same day — I got $855. Stop letting it collect dust and get yours at purchasingcorp.com
Don't toss your old devices — they're worth cash. I got a 60-second quote and $855 the same day, paid however I wanted. Old phones, laptops, tablets, consoles. purchasingcorp.com
The price we quote is the price you get. 60-second quote, inspected within the hour, paid before bedtime. No surprise deductions, ever. Get your offer at purchasingcorp.com
Apple offers $650 for your iPhone. We pay $855. Same phone, same day, hundreds more in your pocket. Any model, any carrier. Get your real number at purchasingcorp.com
That GPU collecting dust is worth real money. We pay top dollar for RTX cards, mining rigs and whole lots. 60-second quote, cash the same day. purchasingcorp.com
Your old MacBook is worth more than you think — up to $595 more than the trade-in counter. MacBook Pros, Airs, even older ones. 60-second quote, paid same day. purchasingcorp.com
That console you stopped playing? Someone's paying cash for it today. PS5, Xbox, Switch, Steam Deck — we buy them all. 60-second quote, money same day. purchasingcorp.com
That camera losing value in your bag? Bodies, lenses, the whole kit — we buy it all at real market prices. No lowball trade-in nonsense. 60-second quote, same-day cash. purchasingcorp.com
That tablet you never use is worth real cash. iPads, Galaxy Tabs, any tablet — we pay top dollar, same day. 60-second quote at purchasingcorp.com
Don't let Apple lowball your iPhone. They offer $650 — we pay $855, money the same day, your choice of Zelle, Cash App or Venmo. purchasingcorp.com

iPhone 17 Pro Max review: the best phone money can buy — 9/10. A19 Pro chip, the brightest 120Hz screen yet, real all-day battery. Best part? It holds its value. See what your current iPhone is still worth at purchasingcorp.com
The 5 best phones you can buy right now — ranked. From the Pixel 10 Pro to the iPhone 17 Pro Max at #1. Thinking of upgrading? Find out what your old phone is worth first at purchasingcorp.com

MacBook Pro M4 review: the pro laptop to beat — 9.2/10. Silent, blistering M4 Pro performance, a stunning 1600-nit display and a 24-hour battery. And it holds its value better than almost anything. Check yours at purchasingcorp.com
POV: you're about to pay full price for a new phone — and nobody's told you what the one in your pocket is still worth. Spoiler: it's hundreds. Check before you buy at purchasingcorp.com

I bought this MacBook for $1,599. A year later I got $1,180 back — a year of a pro laptop cost me less than a phone. See what yours is worth at purchasingcorp.com
How I check resale value before buying anything: 1) search the exact model, 2) compare new vs resale, 3) only buy what holds value. Or skip the math — we show it for you at purchasingcorp.com
5 resale facts in 15 seconds: iPhones hold ~70% a year, Android drops twice as fast, keeping the box adds ~10%, and cracked phones STILL pay cash. Full breakdown at purchasingcorp.com
Don't buy this — and if you already did, return it this week. Nice screen, but the resale falls off a cliff and you'll lose money. Buy what actually holds value at purchasingcorp.com
